moving-checklist.intro: Moving from South Africa to the Netherlands involves long-haul logistics, document preparation, and money transfer planning. This checklist helps you cover pre-departure steps, travel prep, and a clear handoff to your first days in the Netherlands.
whatOftenMatters: Long-haul move: book flights and shipping well in advance
Document prep timing: allow for DHA and apostille where needed
Money transfer and banking: plan for first-month costs and possible delays in opening a Dutch account
School and family documents if moving with children
documentConsiderations: South African civil records may need apostille; allow time for DHA and logistics
Passport validity and renewal: avoid last-minute renewal
transferTravelNotes: Consider currency exchange and transfer services for initial setup costs
Keep essential documents in hand luggage

arrival-planner.intro: If you're arriving in the Netherlands from South Africa, your first days will focus on registration, BSN, and banking. This planner helps you sequence those steps and plan for the buffer you may need after a long-haul move.
whatOftenMatters: Allow a short buffer after long-haul arrival before heavy admin
Document accessibility: have originals and certified copies ready
Early sequencing: municipality registration → BSN → bank account → other setup
documentConsiderations: Have passport and any required certified or apostilled documents to hand for registration

first-90-days.intro: Your first 90 days from South Africa will include stabilizing banking, transport, and routines. This planner covers week 2 onward: DigiD, GP, recurring payments, and integration choices.
whatOftenMatters: Transfer and banking continuity from your existing setup
Driving licence awareness if you plan to drive in the Netherlands

document-readiness.intro: South African document authorities (e.g. DHA for civil records, passport) can have variable processing times. This checker helps you see what you need and plan for apostille or translation where required.
whatOftenMatters: Civil records (birth, marriage) from DHA; apostille may be required
Passport validity and renewal lead times
documentConsiderations: Apostille and legalization for certain civil documents
Translation of documents if not in English or Dutch

moving-checklist.intro: Moving from the United States to the Netherlands requires careful prep: visa/permit route, document timing, and travel logistics. This checklist covers pre-move steps, money transfer, and handoff to arrival.
whatOftenMatters: Visa or residence permit route (e.g. highly skilled migrant, DAFT)
Document certification and apostille where needed
Money transfer and first-month costs in euros
documentConsiderations: U.S. civil documents: state-issued certified copies; apostille may be required
Passport validity for the intended stay

arrival-planner.intro: After arriving from the U.S., your first days in the Netherlands will center on registration, BSN, and banking. This planner helps you prioritize and sequence those steps.
whatOftenMatters: Municipality registration and BSN as first priorities
Health insurance within the required period

first-90-days.intro: Your first 90 days in the Netherlands will include DigiD, GP registration, and daily life setup. This planner helps you stabilize routines and admin after your move from the U.S.

document-readiness.intro: U.S. documents (passport, civil records, employment papers) often need to be in order before and after your move. This checker helps you see what's required and plan for apostille or translation.
whatOftenMatters: Passport and copies for registration and banking

moving-checklist.intro: Moving from India to the Netherlands involves visa/permit preparation, document attestation, and travel planning. This checklist covers pre-departure steps and handoff to your first days.
whatOftenMatters: Visa and permit route and employer sponsorship docs
Family documents if moving with dependants
documentConsiderations: Passport and civil documents; attestation and apostille as required
Educational and employment documents for permit and registration

arrival-planner.intro: Your first days in the Netherlands from India will focus on registration, BSN, and banking. This planner helps you sequence admin and avoid common bottlenecks.
whatOftenMatters: Registration and BSN as soon as you have an address
Bank account for salary and payments
Document originals and copies ready for appointments

first-90-days.intro: Stabilizing your first 90 days after moving from India includes DigiD, GP, and daily routines. This planner covers week 2 to month 3.

document-readiness.intro: Indian document requirements for the Netherlands can include attestation and apostille. This checker helps you see what to prepare and where to get it.
whatOftenMatters: Passport and civil documents; MEA attestation where applicable
Translation if documents are not in English or Dutch
